title: cercestis ivorensis
intro: Cercestis ivorensis, also known as the Ivory Palm, is a species of palm tree native to West and Central Africa. The medicinal properties of Cercestis ivorensis are attributed to its stem sap, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating fever, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Cercestis ivorensis is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic benefits.
